content.question: What is the causal direction and magnitude of the relationship between school closure and subsequent community depopulation in the Hungarian context specifically (i.e., does closure accelerate depopulation, or is it a response to pre-existing depopulation)?
content.reduction_path: Commission a difference-in-differences or instrumental-variable study using Hungarian administrative data on school closures (2013–present) and municipal population change, controlling for pre-closure demographic trends and regional fixed effects, with specific focus on North-Eastern and South-Western regions where both school viability pressure and depopulation are documented as acute.
